name: shieldbot
description: Shieldbot — AI-powered security code review plugin for Claude Code

plugins.name: shieldbot
plugins.description: AI-powered security code review agent. Combines Semgrep (5,000+ rules), bandit, ruff, detect-secrets, pip-audit, and npm-audit to detect vulnerabilities, hardcoded secrets, and CVEs — then delivers a prioritized, actionable security report.
